The '''Silent Blades''' were a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] band that was active during [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], they were pursued for [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Far Orbit]]'', led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Vocis Kenit]], before the pirates were forced to [[Battle of the Silent Blades|fight]] the Imperials in an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Unidentified asteroid field (Silent Blades)|field]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The pirates were all but destroyed by the ''Far Orbit''{{'s}} complement of [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Following the battle, a few survivors of the Silent Blades renamed themselves the '''Tarnished Blades''', and started to conduct piracy near the [[Ringali Nebula/Legends|Ringali Nebula]] sometime around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==History==
The Silent Blades were a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] active in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], they destroyed several [[Patrol ship/Legends|system patrol craft]] and [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] that belonged to governments in the Outer Rim, prompting the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to send out the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Far Orbit]]'', under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Vocis Kenit]], to deal with the pirates after those governments complained about the losses. The Imperials tracked the Silent Blades for several [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] before trapping them in an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Unidentified asteroid field (Silent Blades)|field]]. There, the Imperials could not get at the pirates with the ''Far Orbit'', nor could the Silent Blades escape. Kenit, ignoring his [[Executive officer/Legends|second-in-command]] [[Dhas Fenoep Vedij]]'s advice to wait for reinforcements, sent the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] complement of the ''Far Orbit'' at the pirates. In the ensuing [[Battle of the Silent Blades|battle]], the pirates were all but destroyed, though all of the TIEs were eliminated as well.<ref name="Orbit" />

Following their defeat, some survivors of the Silent Blades banded together and renamed themselves the Tarnished Blades. They started to operate near the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds's]] [[Ringali Nebula/Legends|Ringali Nebula]] under the command of [[Shel Marcino]], who was a mere deckhand when the Silent Blades were attacked. The Tarnished Blades vowed to exact revenge on Captain Kenit and the ''Far Orbit'' for defeating them.<ref name="Orbit" />

{{RPGseed}}
The pirates eventually found the ''Far Orbit'' in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], which was in the Core's [[Ringali Shell]]. However, it turned out that some of the crew, led by Vedij, had previously [[Mutiny on the Far Orbit|mutinied]] out from under Kenit's control and captured the ship from the Imperials, partially because Kenit's leadership had killed so many [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] in the attack on the pirates. Due to the change in the frigate's leadership and allegiances, the Tarnished Blades agreed to help the crew, who had become [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] following the mutiny. The pirates did this as there was a chance of encountering Kenit again, the man actively hunting the rogue frigate.<ref name="Orbit" />
{{Endgame}}

==Organization==
The Silent Blades were a pirating group. However, they were fragmented due to the attack at the hands of the ''Far Orbit''{{'s}} starfighter complement, though some of the survivors were reorganized as the Tarnished Blades by Marcino. As the Tarnished Blades, the group only had a couple of light [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]], including the [[Dark Vendetta (freighter)|''Dark Vendetta'']], as well as a pair of [[Preybird-class starfighter|''Preybird''-class starfighters]].<ref name="Orbit" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Tarnished Blades, and its predecessor, the Silent Blades, were first mentioned in [[1998]]'s ''[[The Far Orbit Project]]'', by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]]. The book was a supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and was a sequel of sorts to the previous publication ''[[Pirates & Privateers]]'', carrying on that book's theme by following the [[Privateer/Legends|privateering]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] ''Far Orbit''.<ref name="Orbit" />
